title: SCP ESCAPE
description: This mod adds SCPs from all branches! There it is also compatible with Survival mode with custom crafting recipes!
body:
This Mod is all about the SCP foundation and its your job to SECURE.CONTAIN.PROTECT
this is a passion project as im a big fan of SCP!
(Note:Site 95 SCPs coming soon)
credits to the SCP foundation and the people who made the logo which i think was Far2
SCPs in the mod:41
I just wanted to say, Thank you for the downloads! I didnt expect even 100 downloads but I really appreciate it.
**I AM CURRENTLY REMODELING AND REVAMPING NEARLY EVERY SCP, SO IT MIGHT BE A WHILE UNTIL NEXT UPDATE**
SCP wiki
[https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/)

SCP Escape Wiki
[https://scpescapewiki.wordpress.com/](https://scpescapewiki.wordpress.com/)

Youtube Video:
[https://youtu.be/NhnUv7jSWWU](https://youtu.be/NhnUv7jSWWU)
